artifacts.title: Thanks receipt from 2019-03-26
artifacts.excerpt:
Google: Yes? #AMP? Move whole internet onto our servers?

Us: No.

Google: Yes now?

Us: No.

G: Yes? Still curious. We just gonna be working on this, just in case.

Us: NO GOOGLE

G: ..Yes?

Us: *busy living life*

G: OK GREAT WE DO THING THANKS FOR ENGAGING #blocksidewalk
